name: combobox-responsive
visual_summary: The combobox-responsive component is a form of dropdown menu that adapts to the size of its container. When expanded, it displays a list of options that can be selected. This component is suitable for when a user needs to select from a long list of options in a limited space, such as a mobile app.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: combobox-responsive
Description: The combobox-responsive component is a form of dropdown menu that adapts to the size of its container. When expanded, it displays a list of options that can be selected. This component is suitable for when a user needs to select from a long list of options in a limited space, such as a mobile app.
Style: material design, light
Interactions: clickable, hover, expanded
Tags: form, input, select, dropdown, responsive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
